title: 子どもたちから学ぶもの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, we're volunteering to play with some
children at a nearby kindergarten.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek deftly chases the children around the
playground, until...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She accidently hits her head full force on the
playground equipment and sinks to the ground.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That bump earlier really startled me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine. I was seeing stars right when I smacked
my head...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But after that, my mind actually felt surprisingly
clear. I had a really easy time running for some
reason.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Maybe... Maybe I can use this to my
advantage in races?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can we go back to the academy and test it
out?
choice_data_list: You're going to hit your head again?!
You're going to hit your head again?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! No, no! I just want to try running again.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If all goes well, maybe I can make you smile even
wider! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek appears to have figured something
out by hitting her head, and her running
noticeably improves!
